---
name: Backlog intake
about: Capture a future task, idea, bug, or debt item for later triage.
title: "[backlog] "
labels:
  - needs-triage
---

## Summary

Describe the task, problem, or idea in one or two sentences.

## Context

Add any context that would help a later discovery session. Rough notes are fine.

## Evidence Or References

Link related docs, PRs, runs, screenshots, or prior issues if you have them.

## Desired Outcome

If you already know what "done" should look like, sketch it here. Otherwise leave a rough note.
